subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who hath created the heavens and the earth by His command, for verily He is the All-Powerful, the Supreme, the Self-Subsisting [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان من خلق السموات و الارض بامر من عنده و انه لهو المقتدر المهیمن القیوم
subcodes.subjects: @justice ['adl]; social justice and divine justice, @justice and wrath of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @suffering and imprisonment, @call to action, @piety; righteousness; fear of God [taqwa]
